rows.label: qev012001_MSG0001
rows.name: Huh...? Hmm... This is bad...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ah...? Huh!? If it isn't Senpai! 
What are you doing in a place like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Or rather, am I in the way? 
Sorry, I'll move right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0004
rows.name:
Heave-ho... 
W-wait! 
Uwaaaaaah!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0005
rows.name:
Phew— That was bad, bad! 
I almost accidentally became a dropped item myself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0006
rows.name:
Man, I really need to get used to this! 
I've done nothing but mess up ever since I left NLA...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0007
rows.name:
Just now... 
Wow! So this is an adventure! 
What is this Nightglow Forest, it's so fun![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0008
rows.name: I was getting totally carried away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0009
rows.name:
When suddenly I got attacked by a pack of unknown beasts! 
Of course, I have zero confidence in combat, 
so I ran away as fast as I could...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0010
rows.name: But somewhere along the way, I ended up dropping my mobile terminal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0011
rows.name:
Without that, I can't call a rescue heli, 
I can't call a taxi, and I can't order pizza delivery...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0012
rows.name: Oh yeah! I still had all those permanent reward points saved up, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0013
rows.name:
Uwaaah, this is the worst— 
What a waste— 
I should've paid my bills with those points—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0014
rows.name:
So, um... Senpai! 
Your cute junior has a favor to ask...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0015
rows.name: Could you help me look for my mobile terminal?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0016
rows.name:
It shouldn't be a massive search. 
I definitely dropped it somewhere around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0017
rows.name:
Two heads are better than one, and more is even better! 
I think our chances of finding it go way up with more people![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_JNK0030
rows.name: Cooperate

rows.label: qev012001_SEL0031
rows.name: Search together with Miia.

rows.label: qev012001_JNK0040
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev012001_SEL0041
rows.name: Tell her you don't have the time to help.

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0018
rows.name: Wow, really?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0019
rows.name:
Thank you so much! 
You're the best, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0020
rows.name: Real BLADE professionals are all so virtuous, aren't they![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0021
rows.name: Ehhh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0022
rows.name: Senpai, you're so colddd![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0023
rows.name:
A promising rookie... well, I haven't officially debuted yet, 
but your cute junior is in trouble here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0024
rows.name:
Come on, you have to help me! 
Please![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0025
rows.name:
Who knows, there might be a massive reward 
waiting for you in return![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0026
rows.name: Well then! Let's start the search right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0027
rows.name:
Senpai, you look over there! 
I'll look over here! 
Give a loud shout when you find it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0028
rows.name:
If you run into enemies, 
please handle them at your own risk![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0029
rows.name:
Okay! 
Disperse![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0030
rows.name:
How's it going~ Senpai? 
Any luck finding it~?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0031
rows.name: If there was a moment I could've lost the terminal...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0032
rows.name:
It'd be when I took a spectacular tumble while being 
chased by native creatures south of this tree~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0033
rows.name:
I feel like I might've heard a *plop!* sound when that happened... 
or maybe not...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0034
rows.name:
Ah, Senpai! 
How is it? 
Did you find my mobile terminal?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0035
rows.name:
Whoa... This is it, this is it! 
It's definitely mine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0036
rows.name:
Wow~ I couldn't find it at all when I looked! 
You're amazing~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0037
rows.name: Thank you very much, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0038
rows.name:
Real BLADEs really are on another level! 
You totally showed me the difference in our class![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0039
rows.name:
I'll devote myself more and more to becoming 
a splendid BLADE quickly! 
I swear it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0040
rows.name:
Thanks for taking care of me this time. 
If we meet somewhere again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0041
rows.name: I'll be a BLADE by then too, so we might be business rivals![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0042
rows.name:
Please go easy on me! 
It's a promise, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0043
rows.name: Well then! If you'll excuse me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0044
rows.name: Take care on your travels too, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_JNK0010
rows.name: See her off

rows.label: qev012001_SEL0011
rows.name: Watch Miia leave in silence.

rows.label: qev012001_JNK0020
rows.name: Call out

rows.label: qev012001_SEL0021
rows.name: Demand a reward.

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0045
rows.name: Adventure, adventure, la-la-la-la-la~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0046
rows.name:
Huh? 
Did you say something, Senpaaai? 
I couldn't hear you well~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0047
rows.name:
Ah, words of encouragement? 
Much obliged! 
I'll do my beeest![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0048
rows.name: See ya~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0049
rows.name:
Fueeeeh! Senpaaai! 
Please help meee![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0050
rows.name: Well, there was a big rock blocking the road, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0051
rows.name:
I tried to climb over it, 
but it s-suddenly started moving![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0052
rows.name:
Fueeeeh! I can't get dooown! 
Please help meee![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0053
rows.name: Your junior is in a pinch here~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0054
rows.name: Fwaa...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0055
rows.name: Ah...? Ah, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0056
rows.name:
You really did come to rescue me! 
You're such a pro...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0057
rows.name: Hmm, but still...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0058
rows.name:
Why does this keep happening to me? 
I was just proceeding through the forest normally...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0059
rows.name:
Was it bad karma for running off 
without properly thanking you, Senpai!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0060
rows.name:
I've heard of this before. 
Is this Rinne Tensei? No, maybe that's not it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0061
rows.name:
Well, whatever! 
I'm saved for now, and you're alive too, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0062
rows.name:
Do I need to learn how to handle a gun a bit more 
so I can at least defeat enemies?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0063
rows.name:
Hmmm. 
I don't really want that kind of style, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0064
rows.name:
Anyway! 
Nothing good ever happens in Nightglow Forest, 
so it seems it's just not a good fit for me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0065
rows.name:
Next time, I think I'll try adventuring on the opposite side, 
east of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0066
rows.name:
Well then, 
thank you so much for taking care of me so many times today~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0067
rows.name: Please continue your adventure safely too, Senpai![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012001_MSG0068
rows.name: Farewell![ST:wait ]
